title: Icy's Vanilla Overhaul
description: A vanilla+ experience with QOL and optimization mods.
body:
![Icy's](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9927ae7293d6c608597b82a75caeff3ce966dae5.png)A vanilla+ experience which adds more depth to the game without completely changing the vanilla feel. It comes with multiple QOL and performance mods to ensure a smooth experience.

Features:

  - Cobblemon: Play Pokemon alongside the other additions.
  - Multiplayer QOL: Voice Chat, Chat Mod, Emotes, More animations, Customs paintings & Music
  - Tech: Create, Ad Astra
  - Exploration: Many new biomes, planets and structures to explore. Plus, Terralith world gen
  - New mobs: Harder mobs for the end game
  - Overhauled: End and Nether Dimensions
  - Others: Many QOL mods, villager revamp, new weapons 

Should use at least 4+, ideally 8 GB of ram
